details: recommended installation is pip install whisperx
python usage shows import whisperx, whisperx.load_model, whisperx.load_audio, model.transcribe(audio)
GPU acceleration documentation targets CUDA 12.8, but CPU usage is documented via --device cpu
model-specific Aishell test fixture exists locally and was later confirmed to produce non-empty WhisperX segments

open_questions: README documents richer alignment and diarization flows, but phase 1 runtime validation is limited to the repo-native minimal transcribe path.
